title: MobileOptimizer
description: Mobileoptimizer helps to optimize the Minecraft java edition for mobile. launcher like Pojav glow-worm, zenith launcher etc, Works perfectly with mobile glues render. So use it for fps boost and running Shaders
body:
renders Mineproness I make a Optimizer modpack for pojav glow worm, zenith launcher with MobileGluese render 

# What is MobileGluese
MobileGluese is a new render for running game and shaders with smooth. You can try [mobilegluese](https://github.com/MobileGL-Dev/MobileGlues-release)

# What is Pojav glow worm

It is a modified pojavlauncher which Give us a Mobilegluese and Other renders

# What this is does in Minecraft

Ok i installed many fps boost mods like sodium, entity culling, dynamic fps, krypton, sodium extra etc. If i put so many fps boost mod it cause to bottleneck and the fps is drop on low end device.
